title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TIBSOC PRIMARY SCHOOL, SITUATED IN BARANGAY TIBSOC, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ENRIQUE, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO EUSEBIO M. QUITCO PRIMARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 28269 / 88 OG No. 25, 3889 (June 22, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7488, May 05, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TIBSOC PRIMARY SCHOOL, SITUATED IN BARANGAY TIBSOC, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ENRIQUE, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO EUSEBIO M. QUITCO PRIMARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Tibsoc Primary School, situated in Barangay Tibsoc, Municipality of San Enrique, Province of Negros Occidental, is hereby changed to Eusebio M. Quitco Primary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 5, 1992.
